review_method: Manual review artifact that stores the scored expectation surface from a standalone web-search / LLM-assisted search pass without depending on a live vendor runtime.
notes: This artifact is deterministic by design: it stores only the reviewed scoring floor, not raw third-party outputs.
Hard-filter contract and source coverage are required for every query.
Recall floors are conservative for broad exploratory queries and stricter for anchor-paper queries with DOI-backed must-find targets.

entries.notes: Standalone search should recover at least one core RAG anchor quickly and both within the first 20 results.
Freshness and citation constraints matter more than a single anchor paper for this exploratory query.
Recent-only reasoning papers should remain constraint compliant even if exact ranking varies.
A strong general-purpose baseline should find Attention Is All You Need within the top 20.
Open-access and 2023+ compliance are the main requirement.
Method-selection papers must remain 2024+ and on-topic.
Temporal Fusion Transformer or an equivalent high-impact 2020+ time-series anchor should appear within the top 20.
DeepAnT is the reviewed anchor for this anomaly-detection query.
The specific Temporal Fusion Transformer paper should be recoverable within the top 20.
Lag-Llama is the reviewed foundation-model anchor for time-series retrieval.
A recent CRISPR therapeutics review should be present within the first 20 biomedical results.
AlphaFold 2 is a required anchor within the first 20 results.
Recent clinical-trial coverage matters more than a single canonical paper.
The reviewed Long COVID synthesis should be recoverable while preserving OA and year filters.
SCANPY is the reviewed methods anchor for this scRNA-seq query.
Broad social-science coverage is acceptable if nudge / decision-making relevance is visible.
Survey-methodology coverage is the reviewed expectation; exact paper identity is secondary.
Recent misinformation-network literature should remain 2022+ and source-covered.
The message-passing molecular-property paper is the reviewed interdisciplinary anchor.
Climate / ML coverage and 2022+ compliance are the key reviewed expectations.
Large Language Models in Medicine is the reviewed healthcare anchor.
Adaptive-learning relevance matters more than a single canonical paper.
